title: Water Usage Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for analyzing and optimizing water consumption in manufacturing facilities, aligned with ISO 14046, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC guidelines.

inputs.label: Total Water Input (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of water entering the facility from all sources (municipal, well, recycled).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of water entering the facility from all sources (municipal, well, recycled).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesise tüm kaynaklardan (şebeke, kuyu, geri dönüştürülmüş) giren toplam su hacmi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtvolumen des Wassers, das aus allen Quellen (kommunal, Brunnen, recycelt) in die Anlage gelangt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume total d'eau entrant dans l'installation de toutes sources (municipale, puits, recyclée).
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen total de agua que ingresa a la instalación desde todas las fuentes (municipal, pozo, reciclada).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحجم الإجمالي للمياه الداخلة إلى المنشأة من جميع المصادر (بلدية، بئر، معاد تدويرها).

inputs.label: Production Output (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced in the reporting period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced in the reporting period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Raporlama döneminde üretilen toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der im Berichtszeitraum produzierten Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites au cours de la période de référence.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de unidades producidas en el período de reporte.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الوحدات المنتجة في الفترة المبلغ عنها.

inputs.label: Process Water Used (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Water directly used in manufacturing processes (e.g., cooling, rinsing, chemical mixing).

businessContext_i18n.en: Water directly used in manufacturing processes (e.g., cooling, rinsing, chemical mixing).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İmalat proseslerinde doğrudan kullanılan su (ör. soğutma, durulama, kimyasal karıştırma).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wasser, das direkt in Herstellungsprozessen verwendet wird (z. B. Kühlung, Spülen, Chemikaliendosierung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Eau directement utilisée dans les processus de fabrication (ex. refroidissement, rinçage, mélange chimique).
businessContext_i18n.es: Agua utilizada directamente en procesos de fabricación (ej. enfriamiento, enjuague, mezcla química).
businessContext_i18n.ar: المياه المستخدمة مباشرة في عمليات التصنيع (مثل التبريد والشطف وخلط المواد الكيميائية).

inputs.label: Cooling Water Makeup (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Water added to cooling towers or closed-loop systems to compensate for evaporation and blowdown.

businessContext_i18n.en: Water added to cooling towers or closed-loop systems to compensate for evaporation and blowdown.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Buharlaşma ve tahliyeyi telafi etmek için soğutma kulelerine veya kapalı devre sistemlere eklenen su.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wasser, das Kühltürmen oder geschlossenen Kreisläufen zugeführt wird, um Verdunstung und Abblaseverluste auszugleichen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Eau ajoutée aux tours de refroidissement ou aux circuits fermés pour compenser l'évaporation et la purge.
businessContext_i18n.es: Agua añadida a torres de enfriamiento o sistemas de circuito cerrado para compensar evaporación y purga.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المياه المضافة إلى أبراج التبريد أو الأنظمة المغلقة لتعويض التبخر والتصريف.

inputs.label: Wastewater Discharge (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Volume of wastewater discharged to sewer or treatment facility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of wastewater discharged to sewer or treatment facility.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kanalizasyona veya arıtma tesisine deşarj edilen atık su hacmi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen des Abwassers, das in die Kanalisation oder Kläranlage abgeleitet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume d'eaux usées rejetées à l'égout ou à une station de traitement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de aguas residuales descargadas al alcantarillado o planta de tratamiento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حجم المياه العادمة المصرفة إلى المجاري أو محطة المعالجة.

inputs.label: Recycled Water (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Volume of water treated and reused within the facility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of water treated and reused within the facility.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesis içinde arıtılıp yeniden kullanılan su hacmi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen des Wassers, das behandelt und innerhalb der Anlage wiederverwendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume d'eau traitée et réutilisée dans l'installation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de agua tratada y reutilizada dentro de la instalación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حجم المياه المعالجة والمعاد استخدامها داخل المنشأة.

inputs.label: Leakage Losses (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated water lost through leaks in pipes, valves, and fixtures.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated water lost through leaks in pipes, valves, and fixtures.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boru, vana ve armatürlerdeki sızıntılardan kaynaklanan tahmini su kaybı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Wassermenge, die durch Lecks in Rohren, Ventilen und Armaturen verloren geht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Estimation de l'eau perdue par les fuites dans les tuyaux, vannes et raccords.
businessContext_i18n.es: Agua estimada perdida a través de fugas en tuberías, válvulas y accesorios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المياه المقدرة المفقودة بسبب التسربات في الأنابيب والصمامات والتركيبات.

inputs.label: Industry Type
inputs.businessContext: Industry classification used for benchmarking and normalization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Industry classification used for benchmarking and normalization.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kıyaslama ve normalizasyon için kullanılan endüstri sınıflandırması.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Classification industrielle utilisée pour l'analyse comparative et la normalisation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Clasificación industrial utilizada para la comparación y normalización.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تصنيف الصناعة المستخدم للمقارنة المرجعية والتطبيع.

rules.message: Total water input is less than the sum of identified uses minus recycled water. Check for missing sources or measurement errors.
Recycled water cannot exceed total water input.
Leakage losses exceed 10% of total water input. Immediate investigation recommended.

thresholds.message: Water intensity exceeds 0.5 m³/unit. Benchmark suggests optimization needed.
Recycle rate below 10%. Consider investing in water reuse technologies.
Total water cost exceeds 50,000 currency units. Cost reduction opportunities exist.

formulas.result: totalWaterIn * productionOutput * processWater * coolingWater * (wastewaterDischarge * recycledWater * leakageLosses)

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
